object.desc: Demo of preventing lateral movement with microsegmentation.

section.title: Technical Summary
section.p: As demonstrated in the video, Illumio provides a holistic view of the data center through the Illumination Map. This map allows administrators to visualize dependencies and move from a state of Visibility to Enforcement.
By applying policies agnostic of the underlying network, Illumio effectively stops the spread of ransomware and unauthorized lateral movement within a flat network environment.
